summary: Online car shopping site Edmunds predicts 2021 will be a "pivotal year" for EVs with U.S. sales rising to 2.5% versus 1.9% last year and many new models entering the market in the next 11 months. According to Edmunds, consumers are in for 30 EVs from 21 brands, up from 17 models in 2020.
